package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsNewreaderOnByteSliceConversion() string {
    ruleID := "strings_newreader_on_byte_slice_conversion"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`strings.NewReader(string(b))` instead of `bytes.NewReader(b)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
